creator: nikola.lecic@anthesphoria.net
text:
On Sun, Jan 08, 2012 at 03:38:04PM +0800
  in <CAC_-zwdcn=Zp4BprWSAXvUiTwa8voibvnv77OvyC=_Zp9QXseg@mail.gmail.com>
  Buganini <buganini@gmail.com> wrote:

> Here is another approach, with modifying of bsd.port.mk
> http://www.cnmc.tw/~buganini/bsd.port.mk.patch.txt
> and using
> LIB_DEPENDS=sqlite3.8@loadExt:${PORTSDIR}/databases/sqlite3

I don't think this is a good idea because *_DEPENDS mechanism is
supposed to provide *building* of non-installed dependencies and not
just to stop the process. Since currently there is no way to *force* a
port to rebuild with a different set of options, creating of slave
port remains the only "official" approach, which guarantees that
everything gets built, as far as I can see.

(Anyway, you should submit this as a separate PR.)

-- 
Nikola Lecic
